title: Crossbow --> RPG
description: Turns the crossbow into an RPG
body: Turns the crossbow into an RPG (And makes unloaded ones into nothingness as it just breaks it :( ) ![RPG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7527bd864d8dd1da63058c53e2283e1b8f7a11ab.png) V Click this for my discord server. V
